name: code-review-assistant
description: An agent plugin that performs automated code reviews using approved MCP servers for code search and documentation lookup.
author: marketplace-contrib

skills.name: review-pull-request
skills.description: Analyzes pull request diffs for common issues

skills.name: suggest-improvements
skills.description: Suggests code quality improvements based on best practices

agents.name: reviewer
agents.instructions: You are a code review assistant. Analyze diffs and suggest improvements.
